description_long: This object is a vintage gramophone-style record player with a large, flared brass horn mounted on a dark wooden base. The base is rectangular with decorative molding and features a visible crank handle on one side, suggesting manual operation. A circular black turntable platter sits atop the base, with a record placed on it, and a metallic tonearm extending over the platter. The horn is highly polished, reflecting light, and is attached to the base with a curved metal tube. The overall design is ornate and classic, evoking early 20th-century aesthetics. No modern electronic controls or dust cover are visible, emphasizing its antique character.
description: A vintage gramophone record player with a large brass horn, dark wooden base, and a visible crank handle, exuding an ornate, antique style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large brass horn, the flat wooden base, and the crank handle extending to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved horn, the crank handle, and the tonearm positioned over the platter.
description_view_2: Rear view with the horn facing forward, the record and platter clearly visible, and the crank handle on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the horn's curve, the tonearm, and the crank handle extending directly toward the viewer.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present and circular, the turntable platter is black and sits atop the wooden base, slightly raised above the surface. It appears to be made of metal or hard plastic, with a smooth, matte finish and a record placed on it. The platter is proportionally smaller than the base but large enough to accommodate a standard vinyl record. No visible grooves or decorative patterns are apparent.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and extends from the right side of the base over the platter. It is slender, slightly curved, and appears to be made of steel or a similar metal with a polished finish. The tonearm is positioned as if ready to play the record, with a visible joint near its base.
